# Fridge To Meals

> Generate recipes from ingredients in your kitchen. Busy life. Meals decided.

Fridge To Meals is a web app that turns fridge ingredients into meal ideas with cuisine, prep time, and cooking style filters.

## Key pages

- [Home / Recipe Generator](https://www.fridgetomeals.com/): Add ingredients, pick meal type, generate recipes
- [Today's Picks](https://www.fridgetomeals.com/todays-picks): Daily meal suggestions
- [My Fridge](https://www.fridgetomeals.com/my-fridge): Save pantry ingredients
- [Favorites](https://www.fridgetomeals.com/favorites): Saved recipes
- [Terms & About](https://www.fridgetomeals.com/terms): Product info, privacy, terms

## Features

- Ingredient-based recipe generation
- Meal type filters (breakfast, lunch, dinner, dessert, and more)
- Cuisine, prep time, and cooking style preferences
- Saved favorites and fridge inventory for signed-in users

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://www.fridgetomeals.com/sitemap.xml)
- [Web app manifest](https://www.fridgetomeals.com/manifest.webmanifest)
